brief_summary.purpose: Personal recipe blog, warm editorial magazine-quality
brief_summary.voice: The Warm Host — passionate home cook, casual, expressive, sensory
brief_summary.tagline: Food made with love, shared freely.
brief_summary.value_prop: A curated collection of recipes from my kitchen to yours.

tools_used.note: Design tokens were pre-specified in brief Step 3; applied directly without re-deriving.

tools_used.reason: MCP installed but API token returned Unauthorized; brief Step 3 already specifies the design system derived from that editorial style, so no blocker to the build.
Brief supplied an explicit hero prompt; manual implementation matches design tokens exactly and keeps build self-contained.
Sections 1–6 are fully specified in brief Step 5; manual assembly guarantees exact compliance with content, order, and design tokens.

tools_used.note: Brief Step 6 referenced pre-existing images in images/ but the folder was empty in the starter. Generated all 6 at 2K via nano-banana-2 rather than falling back to flat SVGs.

sections_built.notes: Large serif headline with word-level stagger, subtitle, 2 CTAs, editorial hero image, floating garnish accents, pick-of-the-week card
Pasta, cake, salad — image, category, title, description, difficulty dots, cook time, servings
Slow-Roasted Herbed Lamb Shoulder, 6hr cook time, serves 6–8, difficulty meter
248 recipes, 18 categories, 42,000+ happy cooks, ∞ good meals — count-up on scroll
Portrait left, personal story right, dark-brown surface, CTAs

images_generated.prompt: Editorial overhead food photography — hero dish, terracotta and cream palette
Brown butter sage pasta, crispy sage, parmesan, terracotta bowl
Dark chocolate layer cake, glossy ganache drip
Mango avocado summer salad with cilantro and lime
Slow-roasted herbed lamb shoulder, cast iron, candlelit
Home cook portrait in sunlit kitchen, apron dusted with flour

animations_applied: Hero title fade + rise 900ms with 120ms word stagger, subtitle/CTA delayed
Recipe cards fade-in with 100ms stagger between siblings
Recipe card hover lift 8px + image zoom 1.07 + shadow
Navbar background + shadow appear after 80px scroll
Stats numbers count up on scroll into view (ease-out cubic, 1600ms)
Active nav link underline on section intersection
prefers-reduced-motion collapses all transforms and animations

seo.title: Kitchen Stories — Food made with love, shared freely.
seo.description: A curated collection of recipes from my kitchen to yours. From quick weeknight dinners to slow Sunday bakes.

tech_stack.css: Tailwind CDN + custom :root tokens + scoped styles
tech_stack.js: vanilla, no framework, no build step
tech_stack.fonts: Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Lora, DM Sans)
